Requirement Description: System shall authenticate valid users with correct credentials
System shall reject invalid credentials with 401 response
System shall lock account after 5 failed attempts with 429 response
System shall create a session on successful login
System shall clear the session on logout
System shall handle missing or malformed request body gracefully
System shall return user role in profile response
Health endpoint shall return 200 without authentication
System shall accept and return application/json content type
System shall not be vulnerable to SQL injection via login fields
System shall protect against XSS via login fields
System shall enforce rate limiting per IP address
System shall not be vulnerable to session fixation attacks
Rate limiting lockout shall trigger precisely at threshold
System shall not reveal whether a username exists (user enumeration)
System shall never return password or password hash in any response
Error messages shall not expose internal implementation details
Login endpoint shall reject non-POST HTTP methods with 405
Session cookie shall have appropriate security attributes
System shall not include permissive CORS headers on protected endpoints
Profile endpoint shall reject unauthenticated and tampered requests
Login endpoint shall respond within 200ms at P95 under normal load
Health endpoint shall respond within 10ms on average
Profile endpoint shall respond within 50ms on average under load
API responses shall use application/json Content-Type
Error messages shall be human-readable without technical jargon
Response structure shall be consistent across all endpoints
